title: Section 27
content: No deductions other than those authorised by or under this or any other Act shall be made from the pay, pensions, gratuities, allowances and other benefits due to officers and 1[sailors] under any regulations for the time being in force.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 53 of 1974, s. 2, for "seaman" (w.e.f. 16-12-1974).
